query:
SELECT id, portfolioId, transactionType, ticker, shares, pricePerShare, currency, transactionDate, notes 
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE portfolioId = 270001 
ORDER BY transactionDate ASC 
LIMIT 30
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT id, portfolioId, transactionType, ticker, shares, pricePerShare, currency, transactionDate, notes 
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE portfolioId = 270001 
ORDER BY transactionDate ASC 
LIMIT 30
